sections.paragraph:
- Original: συντελέω

- Transliteration: sunteleo

- Phonetic: soon-tel-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to end together or at the same time

2. to end completely

a. bring to an end, finish, complete

3. to accomplish, bring to fulfilment

a. to come to pass

4. to effect, make, (conclude)

5. to finish

a. to make an end of

b. to bring to an end

c. destroy

- Origin: from G4862 and G5055

- TDNT entry: 09:02,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G5055; to complete entirely; generally to execute (literally or figuratively): - end finish fulfil make.
